    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"Node {node['id']} ({node['color']}): rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, {node['pixels']}px")

# Check top bar
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nRow 0: {ascii_lines[0][:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
